hero.title: Packers & Movers in Madurai
hero.subtitle: Anna Nagar to KK Nagar, Bypass Road to Mattuthavani — 310+ verified movers in the Temple City.

intro: Madurai is Tamil Nadu's second city and a major cultural centre. ShiftIndia's 310+ verified vendors cover all localities — from densely packed areas near the Meenakshi Temple to growing residential zones along the Bypass Road and Anna Nagar.
whyUs: Madurai's old-city areas near the temple require small-vehicle access and experienced manpower. Our vendors are prepared for both this and modern high-rise moves.

faqs.q: Can you access areas near Meenakshi Amman Temple?
faqs.a: Yes, we use smaller vehicles for temple-zone areas with restricted access.

faqs.q: What does a 2 BHK move cost in Madurai?
faqs.a: ₹6,000 – ₹11,000 locally. Depends on distance, floor, and packing.

faqs.q: Do you move to Chennai and Coimbatore?
faqs.a: Yes, inter-city moves are available with GPS tracking and insurance.
